nasb.text: When the layer of dew evaporated, behold, on the surface of the wilderness there was a fine flake-like thing, fine as the frost on the ground.

esv.text: And when the dew had gone up, there was on the face of the wilderness a fine, flake-like thing, fine as frost on the ground.

cnv.text: 露水上升以後，就見野地上有細小鱗狀的東西，像小白霜一樣細小的東西。

ccb.text: 露水蒸发以后，旷野便出现一层薄薄的、像白霜的东西。
